text:
Mabo v Queensland (No 2) [1992] HCA 23

High Court of Australia

Mason CJ, Brennan, Deane, Dawson, Toohey, Gaudron and McHugh JJ

[1] The Mabo case established native title in Australia.

Competition and Consumer Act 2010

An Act relating to competition, fair trading and consumer protection.

Part I — Preliminary

1 Short title
This Act is the Competition and Consumer Act 2010.
